description: Hostile caller with DND request — should trigger critical red flags

transcript.content: Hi Vikram, this is Priya calling from Freedom with AI. How are you doing today?
Who is this? How did you get my number?
I'm Priya from Freedom with AI. We're reaching out about a free masterclass on AI automation that might be helpful for your business.
I never signed up for anything. This is a scam call. Don't call me again.
I understand your concern, Vikram. I apologize for the inconvenience. I'll make sure we remove your number from our list.
You better. I'm going to file a complaint if you call again. Stop calling me.
I completely understand. Your number has been noted for removal. I'm sorry for the disturbance. Have a good day.
